# ProJob Wiki

> Research wiki for an offline-first trades field operations platform: open-source options, product requirements, proof-of-concept plans, target architecture, and decision records.

Site: https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/
Repository: https://github.com/ajdench/ProJob-Wiki

## Primary Docs

- [Overview](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/): plain-English explanation of what ProJob is, why one existing app is unlikely to be enough, and what needs proving next.
- [Research Overview](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/research-overview/): research summary, recommended product shape, shortlist, and next POC steps.
- [Design Brief](https://github.com/ajdench/ProJob-Wiki/blob/main/design.md): root design contract with tokens, responsive layout rules, UI component guidance, and framework recommendation.
- [Product Requirements](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/requirements/product-requirements/): users, core functions, and offline acceptance criteria.
- [Workflow Map](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/workflows/workflow-map/): quote-to-cash, site execution, cross-company dependencies, and resource flows.
- [Shortlist](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/evaluation/shortlist/): recommended evaluation order.
- [Scoring Matrix](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/evaluation/scoring-matrix/): initial comparative scoring and weighted criteria.
- [Gap Register](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/evaluation/gap-register/): missing/thin areas, augmentations added, and remaining POC evidence needs.
- [POC Plan](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/poc/): proof-of-concept schedule, decision gates, and evidence requirements.
- [Common Test Scenario](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/poc/common-test-scenario/): the workflow every candidate must run.
- [UI Framework Spike Findings](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/poc/findings/ui-framework-spike/): first React/Vite/Tailwind/shadcn implementation spike findings and browser verification notes.
- [Target Architecture](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/target-architecture/): proposed ERP/FSM core plus offline PWA architecture.
- [Web and Stack Architecture](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/web-stack-architecture/): documentation, POC, and future product runtime architecture.
- [Suite Composition and Design](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/suite-composition-and-design/): how components should be synthesised into one ProJob application suite with common visuals and styling.
- [Application Suite Blueprint](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/application-suite-blueprint/): workspace, workflow, data object, component pattern, and first vertical-slice blueprint for the ProJob app.
- [UI Framework Options](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/ui-framework-options/): open-source UI framework and component-library options for aligned mobile, tablet, and desktop ProJob screens.
- [Component Map](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/component-map/): ownership map for capabilities across ERP, PWA, Sync API, files, and planning.
- [Integration Contracts](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/integration-contracts/): canonical entities, field APIs, mutation envelope, attachment flow, and ERP adapter boundary.
- [Deployment Runtime](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/deployment-runtime/): current wiki hosting, local container runtime, POC runtime, and future production stages.
- [Offline Sync Model](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/architecture/offline-sync-model/): local data, mutation queue, conflicts, and attachment handling.

## Candidate Option Pages

- [Odoo + OCA Field Service](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/options/odoo-oca-field-service/)
- [ERPNext / Frappe](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/options/erpnext-frappe/)
- [Dolibarr](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/options/dolibarr/)
- [OpenProject](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/options/openproject/)
- [Atlas CMMS](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/options/atlas-cmms/)
- [openMAINT](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/options/openmaint/)
- [Offline-First PWA Stack](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/options/offline-first-pwa-stack/)
- [KoboToolbox / ODK](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/options/kobotoolbox-odk/)

## Machine-Readable Full Context

- [llms-full.txt](https://ajdench.github.io/ProJob-Wiki/llms-full.txt)
